title: Charlotte Matthews
text:
About me


Charlotte Matthews



<img src="images/headshot.jpg" class="headshot" alt="Headshot">


B.S. in Applied Mathematics (minor in Data Science) at Baylor University (May 2026, GPA 3.73). I like building dashboards and data products that translate complex data into clear decisions—especially in marketing + customer analytics and applied modeling.





Projects



1) Customer & Product Analytics Dashboard (Sigma + Snowflake)
Built an interactive Sigma dashboard on a 2.6B-row dataset to help brands analyze buyer personas and improve channel allocation strategies. Created scalable YoY sales/customer tables in Snowflake and built visuals and filters for regional segmentation and insights.

Sigma Snowflake Dashboards Customer Personas

Project link →







2) IMDb Data Analysis in R
Analyzed an IMDb dataset (5,273 movies, 27 features). Built visualizations in R to explore audience ratings over time, runtime, box office performance, and rating systems; presented findings in a structured PowerPoint.

R ggplot2 EDA Visualization

Project link →






Resume




Education
Baylor University — Waco, TX
B.S. Applied Mathematics, Minor in Data Science (May 2026)
GPA: 3.73 / 4.00
Relevant coursework: Mathematical Statistics II, Regression Analysis, ODE, Linear Algebra, Probability & Statistics, Intro to Data Science, Database Design, Cloud Computing, Numerical Analysis.


Skills
Languages: Python, R, SQL, Julia, LaTeX
Libraries: Pandas, Matplotlib, NumPy, Tidyverse, ggplot2, readr, broom
Tools: RStudio, Snowflake, Sigma, PyCharm, Google Workspace, Linear
Concepts: Data Engineering, Data Visualization, Cloud, Regression, Databases


Experience
Seek Insights — Data Science Intern (Jun 2025–Aug 2025)
- Sigma dashboard on 2.6B rows supporting brand persona insights
- Snowflake YoY tables using 5.6M customers + 935K products
- Segmentation filters across 16,597 cities into 5 personas
- Communicated technical results to marketing + tech stakeholders
